sprints.title: AgentForge v6.6.0 — File-Conflict Detection & Multi-Workspace Support

items.title: File-conflict detection in parallel execute phase
items.description: Before dispatching parallel execute items, the phase scheduler performs a heuristic file-declaration check per item. Items that declare overlapping file paths are serialized rather than parallelized to prevent merge conflicts. Commits: 3ee397d.

items.title: Multi-workspace support — workspace registry + dashboard switcher
items.description: The autonomous loop can now manage cycles across multiple project directories. A workspace registry tracks registered repos. The dashboard gains a workspace switcher in the header so operators can toggle between projects without restarting the server. Commits: 5b903cd, 1decf63.

successCriteria: Parallel execute phase serializes items with overlapping file declarations
Workspace registry stores and retrieves multiple project directories
Dashboard workspace switcher lets operators change active project
All 320 autonomous tests continue to pass
